title: Surf Lessons
description: Catch your first wave or perfect your technique on Portugal's legendary Atlantic coast. Our certified surf instructors lead small-group sessions on carefully selected beaches, adapting each lesson to your experience level. From gentle beach breaks in the Algarve to the powerful swells of Nazaré, every session blends technique, ocean safety, and the raw thrill of riding waves. Equipment, wetsuit, and insurance are included — all you need is a swimsuit and a sense of adventure.
shortDescription: Certified surf instruction on Portugal's best Atlantic beaches for all levels.
meetingPoint: Cabedelo Beach, Viana do Castelo — south bank parking
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

title: Canyoning Adventure
description: Descend through hidden river canyons in the Peneda-Gerês National Park — Portugal's only national park. Our expert guides lead you through a sequence of natural water slides, rappels down waterfalls, cliff jumps into crystal pools, and swims through narrow gorges carved over millennia. No previous experience required; the guides adapt the route intensity to the group. This is raw, wild Portugal at its most exhilarating.
shortDescription: Rappel waterfalls, slide natural chutes, and jump into crystal pools in Gerês National Park.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

title: Stand Up Paddle
description: Glide across the calm waters of the Lima River or explore hidden coves along the Minho coastline on a stand up paddle session. Whether you choose the serene river paddle at sunset or an ocean exploration of sea caves and rock formations, our instructors ensure you feel confident on the board from the first minute. A meditative, full-body workout with stunning scenery at every turn.
shortDescription: Paddle calm rivers at sunset or explore coastal caves and rock formations.
meetingPoint: Lima River Marina, Viana do Castelo
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

title: Horseback Riding
description: Ride Lusitano horses — Portugal's noble breed — through pine forests, along sandy beaches, or across rolling vineyards. Our riding centre offers experiences for all levels: gentle trail walks for beginners and full gallops along the Atlantic shoreline for experienced riders. The Lusitano is famed for its intelligence and smooth gait, making this a truly elegant way to experience the Portuguese countryside.
shortDescription: Ride Lusitano horses through forests, beaches, and vineyards in northern Portugal.
meetingPoint: Equestrian Centre, Afife — Viana do Castelo
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: E-Bike and Fat Bike Tours
description: Explore northern Portugal's dramatic landscapes on two wheels. Choose between electric mountain bikes for longer scenic routes through vineyards and river valleys, or fat bikes for tackling sandy beach trails and rugged forest paths. Our guided tours follow curated routes that pass through traditional villages, stop at local tascas for wine and petiscos, and reveal viewpoints that are impossible to reach by car. The e-bike option makes even hilly terrain effortless.
shortDescription: Guided cycling through vineyards, beaches, and traditional villages on electric or fat bikes.
meetingPoint: Ponte de Lima Town Centre — Tourism Office
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

title: Hike, Dive and Dine
description: A signature full-day experience combining the best of northern Portugal: a morning coastal hike along dramatic cliff paths, a midday coasteering session with cliff jumps and cave swims, and an afternoon long lunch at a family-run seafood restaurant overlooking the ocean. This is the ultimate way to experience the Minho coast — physical, sensory, and deeply local. Limited to small groups for an intimate, unhurried experience.
shortDescription: A full-day coastal hike, ocean swim, and seafood feast on the Minho coast.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Sailing and Boat Tours
description: Set sail along the Portuguese coast or cruise the Douro River on a private or shared boat experience. Options range from a sunset sail along the Minho coastline with sparkling wine, to a full-day Douro River cruise through terraced vineyards with stops at historic wine estates. Skippered by experienced local sailors, every trip is tailored to weather and group preferences. Dolphins are regularly spotted on the Atlantic routes.
shortDescription: Private coastal sails and Douro River cruises with local skippers.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Can-Am Buggy Off-Road
description: Take the wheel of a Can-Am buggy and tear through off-road trails in the mountains behind the Minho coast. Our guided buggy tours follow dirt tracks through eucalyptus forests, ford shallow rivers, climb to panoramic mountain viewpoints, and pass through remote villages where time moves slowly. An adrenaline-pumping way to discover the wild interior of northern Portugal that most visitors never see.
shortDescription: Off-road buggy adventure through mountain trails, forests, and remote villages.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Douro Valley Wine Tasting
description: Journey into the UNESCO-listed Douro Valley for a curated wine tasting at historic quintas. Visit two or three estates, taste award-winning Port wines and Douro DOC reds directly from the barrel, and learn the story of each vintage from the winemakers themselves. Between tastings, take in the staggering beauty of terraced vineyards cascading down to the Douro River. Includes a traditional Portuguese lunch paired with regional wines.
shortDescription: Curated tastings at historic Douro Valley estates with vineyard visits and lunch.
included: Two estate visits with guided tastings
meetingPoint: Porto city centre — hotel pickup available
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Vinho Verde Wine Experience
description: Discover the fresh, aromatic wines of the Minho region on a guided tour of boutique Vinho Verde estates. Visit family-run quintas where granite pergolas shade century-old vines, taste single-varietal Alvarinho and Loureiro wines, and enjoy petiscos — traditional Portuguese small plates — prepared with hyper-local ingredients. This experience is a window into rural Minho culture, far from the tourist trail.
shortDescription: Boutique Vinho Verde estate visits with tastings and traditional petiscos.
meetingPoint: Viana do Castelo Town Centre — Tourism Office
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Portuguese Cooking Class
description: Learn the secrets of Portuguese cuisine in a hands-on cooking class led by a local chef. Start with a guided visit to the morning market to select fresh ingredients — fish from the Atlantic, vegetables from local farms, herbs from the garden. Then cook a full three-course meal: appetiser, main, and dessert. Recipes range from bacalhau à brás and arroz de marisco to the iconic pastel de nata. Finish by sitting down to enjoy everything you've made, paired with regional wines.
shortDescription: Market visit and hands-on cooking of classic Portuguese dishes with a local chef.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Guided Hiking in Gerês
description: Trek through Portugal's only national park with an expert mountain guide. Routes range from gentle lakeside walks around the turquoise waters of Albufeira da Caniçada to challenging summit ascents with panoramic views across the Iberian Peninsula. Along the way, discover ancient Roman roads, wild horses, rare Iberian wolves territory, and granite villages untouched by time. Every hike ends with a picnic of regional specialities at a scenic viewpoint.
shortDescription: Expert-guided treks through Peneda-Gerês National Park with scenic picnics.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

title: Private Chauffeur Day Trip
description: Explore Portugal at your own pace with a private chauffeur driving a premium vehicle. Design your itinerary or choose from our curated routes: Porto's historic centre and wine cellars, the Douro Valley's terraced vineyards, Braga's baroque churches and Bom Jesus, or the wild Minho coastline from Caminha to Viana. Your driver doubles as a local guide, sharing insider knowledge and securing reservations at restaurants that don't appear on Google.
shortDescription: Premium private transport with a local guide for custom day trips across Portugal.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

title: Outdoor Yoga Session
description: Start or end your day with a yoga session in an extraordinary setting — on a cliff overlooking the Atlantic, in a terraced garden surrounded by vineyards, or on the deck of a private villa. Our certified instructors offer Vinyasa, Hatha, and Yin styles, adapting each session to the group's needs. Sessions last 75 minutes and include a guided meditation. Available as a one-off experience or as a recurring daily practice during your stay.
shortDescription: Yoga in extraordinary outdoor settings — cliffs, gardens, and private villa decks.
meetingPoint: Your accommodation or designated outdoor location
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 12 hours before

title: Kayak and Sea Caves Tour
description: Paddle through the Algarve's iconic golden sea caves and dramatic rock formations on a guided kayak tour. Departing from Benagil Beach, you'll explore the famous Benagil Cave — one of the world's most spectacular sea grottos — along with dozens of hidden caves, arches, and secluded beaches only accessible by water. The calm Algarve waters make this suitable for beginners. Early morning departures avoid the crowds and catch the best light for photography.
shortDescription: Guided kayaking through Benagil Cave and the Algarve's golden sea grottos.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

title: Porto Food and Culture Walk
description: Discover Porto's culinary soul on a walking tour through the city's most authentic neighbourhoods. Your guide — a local food journalist — leads you through the Bolhão market, hidden tascas in Ribeira, century-old bakeries, and a Port wine cellar in Vila Nova de Gaia. Taste francesinha, pastéis de nata fresh from the oven, presunto from Trás-os-Montes, and aged Port wine. Along the way, hear the stories of Porto's culinary traditions and the people keeping them alive.
shortDescription: Walking food tour through Porto's markets, tascas, and Port wine cellars.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before
